articles.title: MLB Polymarket Deal: What It Means for Sportsbooks
articles.summary: MLB signed a deal with Polymarket to become an official data partner, marking crypto prediction markets' first major sports league partnership. Traditional sportsbooks now face competition from a platform that doesn't need gambling licenses and can offer markets on everything from player stats to league controversies.

articles.title: Binance to launch prediction market feature within its wallet app via Predict.Fun
articles.summary: Binance is adding prediction markets to its wallet app through a partnership with Predict.Fun, bringing betting functionality directly to one of crypto's largest user bases. This puts prediction markets in front of millions of existing crypto users who already have funds ready to deploy, potentially creating the mainstream adoption breakthrough the space has been waiting for.

articles.title: Feds Sniffing Around Polymarket After Suspicious Bets
articles.summary: Federal investigators are examining unusual betting patterns on Polymarket that suggest possible market manipulation or insider trading. This probe could trigger the first major regulatory crackdown on prediction markets, potentially reshaping how these platforms operate in the US.

articles.title: Madden 27 Cover Athlete: Kalshi Predictions
articles.summary: Kalshi traders are betting on which NFL star will grace the cover of Madden 27, the latest installment of EA's flagship football video game. The market taps into both NFL fandom and gaming culture, offering sharp bettors a chance to profit from celebrity endorsement decisions that typically favor breakout stars and MVP candidates.

articles.title: At least three more Air Force members questioned on Iran war Polymarket betting
articles.summary: The Air Force is investigating at least three more service members for betting on Iran war markets on Polymarket, expanding beyond earlier cases. Military personnel having inside information on conflict decisions creates serious market integrity issues that could prompt regulators to restrict defense-related betting markets.

articles.title: NFL asks prediction market operators to refrain from 'objectionable bets'
articles.summary: The NFL is pushing prediction market operators to stop offering bets they consider inappropriate, likely targeting player injury props, referee decisions, or other outcomes that could compromise game integrity. This signals growing tension between traditional sports leagues trying to control their betting narrative and the freewheeling prediction market world that thrives on offering odds on everything imaginable.

articles.title: Kalshi is aggressively advertising on TikTok, seemingly targeting young people while promising a “money hack”
articles.summary: Kalshi is flooding TikTok with ads pitching prediction markets as a "money hack" to young users who probably can't tell the difference between betting and investing. The aggressive youth-focused marketing signals Kalshi thinks Gen Z will drive the next wave of prediction market adoption, but it also risks attracting regulatory scrutiny over gambling-adjacent advertising to minors.

articles.title: Duke vs UConn Predictions: Kalshi Odds and Markets
articles.summary: Duke and UConn are facing off in what appears to be a high-stakes matchup, with Kalshi offering prediction markets on the outcome alongside traditional betting odds. This game likely represents a major test case for how prediction markets price college basketball compared to sportsbooks, especially given both teams' championship pedigree and national following.

articles.title: Kalshi secures license to offer margin trading to institutional investors
articles.summary: Kalshi just got regulatory approval to let institutional investors trade prediction markets on margin, meaning they can borrow money to amplify their bets. This puts serious capital behind political and economic predictions, potentially making markets more liquid and efficient while giving deep-pocketed players even more influence over the odds.

articles.title: 'Informed' traders on Polymarket netted $143 million in 'anomalous' profit since 2024, researchers find
articles.summary: New research reveals that a group of sophisticated traders on Polymarket made $143 million in profits this year through what researchers are calling "anomalous" trading patterns. The findings suggest either these traders have access to superior information or they've found ways to exploit market inefficiencies that regular bettors are missing.
